# Platform Management

@dynatrace-sdk/client-platform-management-service

## 1.7.0

- Add trial end date to environment settings.

## 1.6.9

### Patch Changes

- Update dependencies. (APPDEV-11813)

## 1.6.8

### Patch Changes

- Improve performance of date transformations. (APPDEV-12840)

## 1.6.7

### Patch Changes

- Improve performance of payload transformations. (APPDEV-12840)
- Added support for optional transformations. (APPDEV-11914)
- Added fix for 'transformToFormDataField' function. (APPDEV-12478)
- Remove generatedAt property from metadata file. (APPDEV-12696)

## 1.6.6

- Fix formatting and guideline violations in API documentation.

## 1.6.5

- Update and extend documentation of the effective permission API.

## 1.6.4

- Update platform-token documentation link.

## 1.6.3

- Update error response object format to be consistent with what the REST API returns.

## 1.6.2

### Patch Changes

- Fix date-time format serialization. (APPDEV-11661)

## 1.6.1

### Patch Changes

- Replace model transformations with single transformation function. (APPDEV-10818)

## 1.6.0

- Include context of an effective permission request also in the corresponding response.

## 1.5.1

- Update description of effective permission endpoint to mention special handling for settings scopes.

## 1.5.0

- Add CREATED_NOT_INITIALIZED as a possible tenant state.

## 1.4.0

### Minor Changes

- Enums are replaced with unions of literals. APPDEV-10338

## 1.3.0

- Update effective permissions description

## 1.2.1

- Improve API documentation.

## 1.2.0

### Features

- Export errors from the package.

## 1.1.0

- Add endpoint for resolving permissions of a user.

## 1.0.1

### Patch Changes

- Minor bugfix related to supporting "default" response. APPDEV-9530

## 1.0.0

- Require either app-engine:apps:run or app-engine:functions:run permissions for calling the public platform management service API.
- Add support for filtering license settings by specific license setting keys.
- Add environment endpoint providing basic information about the environment.
- Rename tenant to environment.

## 0.0.8

### Patch Changes

- Updated boolean serialization handling. APPDEV-9047

## 0.0.7

### Patch Changes

- Fix broken links in the readme file.

## 0.0.6

### Patch Changes

- Do not print empty fields in the default message of an error. APPDEV-7630
- Update documentation. APPDEV-8154
- Updated dependencies 

## 0.0.5

### Patch Changes

- Update http-client
- Sanitize links in the documentation
- Add API reference to the readme file

## 0.0.4

### Patch Changes

- Update documentation.

## 0.0.3

### Patch Changes

- Added security scheme to public PMS API

## 0.0.2

### Patch Changes

- Add new GET license settings endpoint

## 0.0.1

### Patch Changes

- 1st version of client for Platform-management-service (PMS)
